events.text: Wikipedia, a free wiki content encyclopedia, goes online.

pages.title: Wikipedia
pages.description: Free online encyclopedia that anyone can edit
pages.extract: Wikipedia is a free-content online encyclopedia written and maintained by a community of volunteers.

events.text: The Dominican Republic gains independence from Haiti.

pages.title: Dominican Republic
pages.extract: The Dominican Republic is a country located on the island of Hispaniola in the Greater Antilles.

events.text: The Battle of Verdun begins on the Western Front.

pages.title: Battle of Verdun
pages.description: World War I battle on the Western Front
pages.extract: The Battle of Verdun was fought from 21 February to 18 December 1916.
